steps.code: <?php require_once('/wordpress/wp-load.php'); $repo = 'https://github.com/WordPress/gutenberg'; $extras = ',"align":"wide","showRepoPath":false,"showOpenIssues":true,"showCreatedAt":true,"showPushedAt":true,"showDefaultBranch":true,"showVisibility":true,"showArchived":true'; $content = '<!-- wp:repo-pop/repository {"repoUrl":"' . esc_url_raw($repo) . '","layout":"hero-stack"' . $extras . '} /-->'; $existing = get_page_by_path('repo-pop-demo'); $post = array('post_title' => 'Repo Pop', 'post_name' => 'repo-pop-demo', 'post_type' => 'page', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_content' => $content); if ($existing) { $post['ID'] = $existing->ID; $post_id = wp_update_post($post); } else { $post_id = wp_insert_post($post); } if (!is_wp_error($post_id) && $post_id) { wp_update_custom_css_post('body.page-id-' . absint($post_id) . ' main h1:first-of-type{display:none}body.page-id-' . absint($post_id) . ' .wp-block-post-content{margin-top:clamp(24px,5vw,64px)}'); } update_option('permalink_structure', '/%postname%/'); flush_rewrite_rules();
